strengths: 16+ years experience with 14+ years in fullstack Node.js/TypeScript across multiple roles and companies
Active AI agent infrastructure experience including MCP implementation and agentic workflow development at current role
Strong testing and software craftsmanship orientation—TDD practitioner with extensive testing expertise
concerns: No explicit Nest.js framework experience; core web framework for the role not demonstrated
Limited relational database exposure; recent roles focused on MongoDB without clear PostgreSQL/MySQL depth
No explicit demonstration of authentication, authorization, or security best practices in resume

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP infrastructure experience
Nest.js framework and relational database gaps

response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates exceptional fullstack depth with 16+ years in Node.js/TypeScript, the core of the required tech stack, and currently works directly on AI agent infrastructure and MCP implementation—addressing a key requirement. His strong testing and craftsmanship culture aligns with the role's code quality emphasis. Primary gaps are Nest.js framework specifics and relational database breadth (vs. MongoDB focus), plus undemonstrated security best practices; these are learnable for an engineer of this seniority, though would require onboarding time.
